---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the Jenkins integration
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is.

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Use Case
Explain the use case and why this feature would be valuable.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact
- [ ] This would improve security scanning capabilities
- [ ] This would improve Jenkins integration
- [ ] This would improve documentation
- [ ] This would improve performance

## Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or references here.

## Example Implementation
If applicable, provide pseudo-code or examples of how this might work:

```groovy
// Example code
```
